Hot pies, fresh bread, coffee and cabinet sweets from the counter.

Step into The Gumdale Bakery, choose from the glass cabinet, check the blackboard menu, add your details for a larger takeaway order note, or call the team when timing matters.

Premium takeaway order note

Choose item, add details, then place the note or call.

This is built for a real shop counter, not a fake checkout. Write the item, quantity, time, name and phone clearly before you call or speak with the bakery team.

Clear counter flow

Use this when you need more than a quick cabinet choice.

1
Choose your itemPie flavour, family pie, sausage rolls, bread, coffee, sandwiches, rolls or sweets.
2
Add exact detailsQuantity, flavour, day, time, name, phone and any simple note the counter needs.
3
Place the order noteCopy the note and use it when calling the bakery or speaking at the counter.
4
Call if timing mattersFor family pies or larger boxes, phone first so the team can confirm availability.

Bread, lunch and sweets

Built around the food people actually see in the cabinet.
